subject: [POLICY] Exclude JDBC from CLAMP ACM participants
commit_message:
[POLICY] Exclude JDBC from CLAMP ACM participants

CLAMP ACM participants do not use a databsae. However, Spring looks for
a JDBC driver when it comes up unless the driver lookup is disabled.

Issue-ID: POLICY-4375
Change-Id: I0cd22cea3972857b669031de0bfc04a07321ae92
Signed-off-by: liamfallon <liam.fallon@est.tech>

Hi Liam,
I think this must have gotten left behind in previous patch
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=oom.git;a=tree;f=kubernetes/policy/components/policy-clamp-be;h=f092b40375b7e3d388ec8dedabc4e3220246fee2;hb=4b31de9cd509903fe8c30b226720c87890857795

Can we remove the clamp-be altogether?
Nice to do it here if you can

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5952/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5952/ )
